US.note: United States transit generally requires immigration and customs processing, and checked bags may need to be collected and rechecked.

CA.note: Canada may require an eTA or transit visa for a connection, depending on nationality and itinerary.

GB.note: United Kingdom transit may require an ETA or transit visa, depending on nationality and whether you pass border control.

AU.note: Australia may require a transit visa or other travel authority, depending on nationality and transit conditions.
